name: dotcom-secrets
description: Russell Brunson's playbook for building sales funnels, value ladders, and Attractive Characters — turning strangers into loyal customers who ascend from free offers to high-ticket products.
useCase: Building sales funnels, creating offer sequences, email storytelling, identifying dream customers, designing Attractive Characters, choosing the right funnel type.
knownRisks: Brunson is a ClickFunnels founder — the book promotes his software
Some tactics (free+shipping, high-ticket application funnels) depend on specific product types
Online marketing changes fast — specific platform tactics may be dated
The Attractive Character concept can blur authenticity if over-engineered
